question_text: Probability to get a boy & girl is 1/2 if A man has three children, the probability to get 2 girls and 1 boy.

options.B: The probability to get a boy and girl is 1 2 . A man has three children, the probability to get 2 girl and 1 boy is___. S = {BBB, GGG, BBG, GGB} n(S) = 4 P(E) = n(E) n(S) [NAT]
